localizations.title: Carcassonne
localizations.hint_1_first: Each council member speaks with their own distinctive accent. Identify the characteristics of each to understand the message they are conveying.
localizations.hint_1: Each accent highlights or references specific letters. Determine these letters, then read them in the order in which the council members are standing, as depicted on card 1.
localizations.hint_2_first: Each council member speaks with their own distinctive accent. Identify the characteristics of each to understand the message they are conveying.
localizations.hint_2: Each accent highlights or references specific letters. Determine these letters, then read them in the order in which the council members are standing, as depicted on card 1.
localizations.hint_4_first: Each council member speaks with their own distinctive accent. Identify the characteristics of each to understand the message they are conveying.
localizations.hint_4: Each accent highlights or references specific letters. Determine these letters, then read them in the order in which the council members are standing, as depicted on card 1.
localizations.hint_24_first: Each council member speaks with their own distinctive accent. Identify the characteristics of each to understand the message they are conveying.
localizations.hint_24: Each accent highlights or references specific letters. Determine these letters, then read them in the order in which the council members are standing, as depicted on card 1.
localizations.hint_10_first: Each council member speaks with their own distinctive accent. Identify the characteristics of each to understand the message they are conveying.
localizations.hint_10: Each accent highlights or references specific letters. Determine these letters, then read them in the order in which the council members are standing, as depicted on card 1.
localizations.hint_34_first: Each council member speaks with their own distinctive accent. Identify the characteristics of each to understand the message they are conveying.
localizations.hint_34: Each accent highlights or references specific letters. Determine these letters, then read them in the order in which the council members are standing, as depicted on card 1.
localizations.hint_44: You need to wake this guard up.
localizations.hint_65: Help the merchant replenish his stall with goods.
localizations.hint_80: Lock the gate to protect the city.
localizations.hint_89_first: Place each meeple within the outline matching its color. Their hands will each point at something.
localizations.hint_89: The council members are pointing at letters. Put them in the proper sequence to proceed.
localizations.hint_78_first: Place each meeple within the outline matching its color. Their hands will each point at something.
localizations.hint_78: The council members are pointing at letters. Put them in the proper sequence to proceed.
localizations.hint_83_first: Place each meeple within the outline matching its color. Their hands will each point at something.
localizations.hint_83: The council members are pointing at letters. Put them in the proper sequence to proceed.
localizations.hint_12: Once the map has been assembled, it will provide you with the number you need to proceed.
localizations.hint_8_first: You can find the spies by looking for the distinctive Templar symbol.
localizations.hint_8: Be sure to share the important details of the spies features, taking into consideration that the other team is looking from a different perspective.
localizations.hint_53: The blacksmith is currently busy. You need to find something that will get his attention.
localizations.hint_32: You should give him a few more coins to persuade him to give you the crown.
localizations.hint_49: You'll need an expert in order to quickly organize these farming tools.
localizations.hint_11: You'll need an expert in order to quickly organize these armaments.
localizations.hint_9: These lazy farmers don't seem to realize they are in danger. You'll need to warn them about the impending threat, and then equip them to defend themselves.
localizations.hint_45: Aldric must distribute the arms in a specific order. Follow his route using the map of Carcassonne.
localizations.hint_82: You'll need to place the meeple on card 67 in their proper places, and then follow them in the order of their arrival. Two of the cards, including this one, will indicate their positions, as well as the order in which they arrived.
localizations.hint_42: You'll need to place the meeple on card 67 in their proper places, and then follow them in the order of their arrival. Two of the cards, including this one, will indicate their positions, as well as the order in which they arrived.
localizations.hint_6: Assemble the map of the region to the west, using the same method as you used for the map of Carcassonne itself. This will guide you to the next step.
localizations.hint_51: Sasha is currently away. Revise the plan by removing the instructions involving them.
localizations.hint_96: Martin is currently away. Revise the plan by removing the instructions involving him.
localizations.hint_35: Basil is away. Revise the plan by removing the instructions involving him.
localizations.hint_74: With the remaining two council members, follow the instructions on the plan.
localizations.hint_28_first: Place each meeple on its corresponding abbey, using the colors of the flags to assist you. This will help you identify the area that the bells' tolls cannot reach.
localizations.hint_28: Only one area is not adjacent to any of the abbeys; as such, the sound of the bells will not reach it. Place Martin there and note the numbering in the corner of the card.
localizations.hint_19: Martin needs to figure out how to sound the alarm.
localizations.hint_64: Place each meeple on the bridge corresponding to its current location, with Sasha being placed on the final bridge. The remaining sections of road will reveal your path forward.
localizations.hint_20: Assemble this map, and you will obtain a red number that you can add to this card.
localizations.hint_77: The Machine symbol is partially missing. You'll need to combine this card with Card 18 in order to properly operate the Machine.
localizations.hint_95: You must target the Templar troops with the catapult.
localizations.hint_40_first: Calculate the number of cards needed to build each of the two cities south of Carcassonne, and then add the number of barracks they each contain.
localizations.hint_40: Multiply the total amount by 2 to determine each city's military strength, as described in the military guide.
localizations.hint_36: Martin continues speaking with his unusual accent. Figure out the message he is trying to convey.
localizations.hint_15: You need to read between the lines, using the blank spaces. The text itself is also quite important, so pay close attention to it.
localizations.hint_14_first: The code enables you to decipher the symbols on the map, while the measurement marks allow you to measure distances.
localizations.hint_14: Follow the instructions on card 15 to locate the hidden relic.
localizations.hint_5: Sasha still has an occasional stutter, though it's a little different this time. Try to figure out what they're trying to say.
localizations.hint_99: Place each meeple within their matching outline, then look at the card from above to decipher the message on the parchment.
localizations.hint_79_first: Using the books you found earlier, calculate the values of the various elements mentioned in the failed attempt at a poem (3).
localizations.hint_79: The statue of the noble boy riding a pig is located just outside the city of Carcassonne. The water tower is found just to the left of the statue, but further down the map.
localizations.hint_3_first: Using the books you found earlier, calculate the values of the various elements mentioned in the failed attempt at a poem.
localizations.hint_3: The statue of the noble boy riding a pig is located just outside the city of Carcassonne. The water tower is found just to the left of the statue, but further down the map.
localizations.answer_hint_1: Each council member has a unique accent, which emphasizes certain letters. By arranging the members in the order depicted on card 1, and then looking at the emphasized letters, you can read TWEN - TY - TI - MES - THR - EE - PL - US - ONE. 20 x 3 + 1 = 61.
localizations.answer_hint_2: Each council member has a unique accent, which emphasizes certain letters. By arranging the members in the order depicted on card 1, and then looking at the emphasized letters, you can read TWEN - TY - TI - MES - THR - EE - PL - US - ONE. 20 x 3 + 1 = 61.
localizations.answer_hint_4: Each council member has a unique accent, which emphasizes certain letters. By arranging the members in the order depicted on card 1, and then looking at the emphasized letters, you can read TWEN - TY - TI - MES - THR - EE - PL - US - ONE. 20 x 3 + 1 = 61.
localizations.answer_hint_24: Each council member has a unique accent, which emphasizes certain letters. By arranging the members in the order depicted on card 1, and then looking at the emphasized letters, you can read TWEN - TY - TI - MES - THR - EE - PL - US - ONE. 20 x 3 + 1 = 61.
localizations.answer_hint_10: Each council member has a unique accent, which emphasizes certain letters. By arranging the members in the order depicted on card 1, and then looking at the emphasized letters, you can read TWEN - TY - TI - MES - THR - EE - PL - US - ONE. 20 x 3 + 1 = 61.
localizations.answer_hint_34: Each council member has a unique accent, which emphasizes certain letters. By arranging the members in the order depicted on card 1, and then looking at the emphasized letters, you can read TWEN - TY - TI - MES - THR - EE - PL - US - ONE. 20 x 3 + 1 = 61.
localizations.answer_hint_44: Aldric, the knight (34), must warn the guards about the impending threat. Therefore, he needs to wake up the guard who is snoozing (44). 34 + 44 =78.
localizations.answer_hint_65: Basil (24) ensures the merchant (65) has adequate food supplies for his stall. 24 + 65 = 89.
localizations.answer_hint_80: Lady Elianor has the keys to the city (+3). She can use them to lock the north gate (80). 3 + 80 = 83.
localizations.answer_hint_89: Place each meeple within its corresponding outline. Each meeple will then point to one or two capital letters with its hands. Arrange these letters, again using the order the council members are arranged on card 1: black, green, blue, yellow, and red. These letters spell out TWELVE.
localizations.answer_hint_78: Place each meeple within its corresponding outline. Each meeple will then point to one or two capital letters with its hands. Arrange these letters, again using the order the council members are arranged on card 1: black, green, blue, yellow, and red. These letters spell out TWELVE.
localizations.answer_hint_83: Place each meeple within its corresponding outline. Each meeple will then point to one or two capital letters with its hands. Arrange these letters, again using the order the council members are arranged on card 1: black, green, blue, yellow, and red. These letters spell out TWELVE.
localizations.answer_hint_12: The city forms the shape of an '8'. The tower's shape in the upper right of the city indicates this is a Machine. Access Machine 8.
localizations.answer_hint_8: The first team identifies a spy by spotting the Templar symbol he wears, after which he disappears. The second team sees the same scene, but from another angle. They can identify the spy using the clues provided by the first team.
localizations.answer_hint_53: Lady Elianor pulls out her pouch (+22) and hands him a few coins. 53 + 22 = 75
localizations.answer_hint_32: Lady Elianor pulls out her pouch again (+22) and pays him a few more coins. 32 + 22 = 54
localizations.answer_hint_9: The farming tools, organized by Basil (73), could help the farmers defend themselves. 73 + 9 = 82.
localizations.answer_hint_45: Aldric first visits the barracks, moving from north to south, tracing the path of a '4'. He then visits the crossbowmen, again moving from north to south, forming the number '2'. Putting these together, Aldric's routes form the number 42.
localizations.answer_hint_82: By using cards 82 and 42, you can identify the positions of each council member around the table on card 67, as well as the order in which they arrived. The sequence starts with Elianor, in the top left, followed by Martin at the bottom left, then Basil to his right, and then Aldric next to Basil. Finally, Sasha takes the remaining spot opposite Aldric. Following these spots in the order the members arrived forms the number '6'.
localizations.answer_hint_42: By using cards 82 and 42, you can identify the positions of each council member around the table on card 67, as well as the order in which they arrived. The sequence starts with Elianor, in the top left, followed by Martin at the bottom left, then Basil to his right, and then Aldric next to Basil. Finally, Sasha takes the remaining spot opposite Aldric. Following these spots in the order the members arrived forms the number '6'.
localizations.answer_hint_6: The layout of the roads creates the number 93.
localizations.answer_hint_51: Removing the black arrows from card 88 forms the number 96.
localizations.answer_hint_96: Removing the green arrows from card 96 forms the number 35.
localizations.answer_hint_35: Removing the blue arrows from card 35 forms the number 74.
localizations.answer_hint_74: Move the red and yellow meeples from their current positions to new locations, according to the corresponding arrows. They meet on the card numbered 20/60; take card 20.
localizations.answer_hint_28: The tolls of the abbeys' bells reach only the cards directly adjacent to them (including diagonally). The only card that is not adjacent to an abbey is the one in the bottom right corner. Place Martin there; that card is numbered 19/60. Take card 19.
localizations.answer_hint_19: Martin uses the hunting horn (38) found at the blacksmith's. 38 + 19 = 57
localizations.answer_hint_64: After sabotaging the bridges, the remaining roads form the number 51.
localizations.answer_hint_20: The cities on the assembled map form a red modifier (+70). Return to Aldric, and add that modifier to this card: 70 + 20 = 90
localizations.answer_hint_77: Only the left half of the Machine symbol is visible on card 18, while only the right half is visible on card 77. Therefore, in order to function, these two Machines must be combined. 18 + 77 = 95. Access Machine 95.
localizations.answer_hint_95: Card 90 indicates that the Templars are attacking from the southwest. Aim the catapult in that direction and press "FIRE" to launch the catapult's projectile.
localizations.answer_hint_40: The two cities are formed by combining a total of 14 cards, and they contain a total of 4 barracks. According to the instructions on card 40, the resulting military strength of both cities totals 36 (14 x 2 + 4 x 2 = 36)
localizations.answer_hint_36: The letters emphasized by Martin's accent are F I F T E E N.
localizations.answer_hint_15: The blank spaces in between the text form the number 14.
localizations.answer_hint_14: Using the code, you can translate the 4 symbols located on the west side of the map. Each symbol corresponds to a certain letter: F, I, V, E. Then, refer to the instructions on card 15. Place a meeple on each of the watchtowers on the map, each displaying a flag matching the color of one of the meeple. Follow the gazes of each pair of opposite meeple to find "where their gazes meet"; draw an imaginary line between each pair of watchtowers, and where those lines intersect, you'll find a tree (the "centennial tree"). From there, measure 7 leagues to the east of this tree, placing the card on top of the map so the number 7 aligns with the number 9, forming the number 79.
localizations.answer_hint_5: The words emphasized by his stutter are "ninety-nine"
localizations.answer_hint_99: The blank space between the placed meeple forms the number 3.
localizations.answer_hint_79: The field has a value of 9 (3 cities, each worth 3: 3 x 3 = 9).  The military strength of Carcassonne is 20 (6 cards + 4 barracks, each worth 2; 10 x 2 = 20). Finally, the road has a value of 6 (6 cards). The code is thus 9, 20, 6; enter 9206 to unlock the chest.
localizations.answer_hint_3: The field has a value of 9 (3 cities, each worth 3: 3 x 3 = 9).  The military strength of Carcassonne is 20 (6 cards + 4 barracks, each worth 2; 10 x 2 = 20). Finally, the road has a value of 6 (6 cards). The code is thus 9, 20, 6; enter 9206 into the Machine to unlock the chest.
localizations.machine_8: You have found all of the spies. Now take the opportunity to prepare yourselves for the invasion.
localizations.machine_57: You succeeded in finding all of the spies!
localizations.machine_95: Your catapult shots cause the Templar troops to disperse.
localizations.machine_79:
Congratulations! You have successfully halted the Templar invasion by
returning their lost relic to them. The city is now alive with banquets and
festivities in honor of its heroes. You can join the council members in the
celebrations by assembling a new map of Carcassonne, showcasing the
jubilant events, using the backs of the six penalty cards.
localizations.intro: Important: During this adventure, do not discard the Penalty cards; instead, return them to the deck.
localizations.post_penalty: Return the Penalty card to the deck.
localizations.machine_57_tuto: You must identify all the spies hiding among the farmers.
localizations.machine_77: You now have projectiles for the catapult!
localizations.machine_8_instructions_1: Press here to identify a spy
localizations.machine_8_instructions_2: Press here after selecting the spy
localizations.machine_8_intro_1:
You must prevent the spies from entering the city. Divide into 2 teams. If you're playing solo, you'll control both teams. Each team has a different perspective overlooking the city's gates.

You can identify the spies by looking for their Templar symbol.
localizations.machine_8_intro_2:
The first team should take the device, preventing the other team from seeing the screen.

You must identify the spies trying to enter the city, and describe them to the other team. Remember what they look like!
localizations.machine_8_spy_detected: You have discovered a spy! Your team should keep the device; it's now your turn to find the next spy.
localizations.machine_8_switch_side_1: Pass the device to the other team.
localizations.machine_8_switch_side_2: Use the information provided by the other team to locate the spy.
localizations.machine_18: You can't use this catapult until you find some projectiles to fire.
localizations.machine_95_before57: Better to wait until you know more and avoid firing randomly.
